text:
There once was a young boy named Timmy who lived on a quiet farm. In his tiny bedroom, Timmy kept a pet pet mouse named Thimble. One sunny morning, Timmy decided he wanted to build a tiny house just like Thimble. After hours of careful construction, complete with makeshift curtains from his clothes, Timmy decided it was time for a small party.

He invited Thimble.

As Thimble nibbled on seeds from Timmy's kitchen garden, guests began to arrive — birds, butterflies, and even a couple of curious squirrels. They danced around the tiny stage Timmy had set up, tapping their feet to the music Timmy put together with a mixtape gleaned from years of collecting songs on vinyl.

Timmy's mom peeked in at the chaotic celebration. "Well, isn't that something?" she chuckled, bemused at the sight of her young son playing host with his tiny mouse.

After hours of feasting and dancing,
